title: Vietnam Airlines Group launches LotusMiles loyalty program
excerpt: Earn miles on every flight and redeem them for seat upgrades, priority boarding, and exclusive community rewards.

title: New route: Hanoi to Paris now open for booking
excerpt: Our long-haul A350-900 now connects HAN to CDG, expanding our European network.

title: Business & Premium Economy booking now open to all members
excerpt: Purchase a seat class pass to unlock premium cabins on your next flight with us.
